subject: Escalation: urban takeover blockers for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-2509
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-2509. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
